children.name: hwPMIntervalTypeTable
children.description: This table is of the period type and is used to provide the performance measurement period attribute query function.

children.name: hwPMInstanceTypeTable
children.description: This table is used to provide the function of querying the performance statistics instance type.

children.name: hwPMStatisticsMaxTasks
children.description: The maximum number of statistics tasks allowed to be created.

children.name: hwPMStatisticsEnable
children.description: Enable or disable the statistics data function.

children.name: hwPMServerTable
children.description: After the performance statistics file is generated, the file is transmitted to the performance management server. The table is used to create a performance management server.

children.name: hwPMCurrentDataTable
children.description: This table is the current performance data table and is used to provide the query function of the statistical data and the current data reset function.

children.name: hwPMHistoryDataTable
children.description: This table is the historical performance data table and is used to provide historical data query function.
